title: Moquiniastrum oligocephalum
taxonomy: Moquiniastrum oligocephalum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It belongs to the genus Moquiniastrum, which is a part of the Malvales order. Moquiniastrum oligocephalum is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as Angola and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. This plant is known for its unique characteristics and has been studied extensively in the field of botany. Further research is needed to understand the full classification and taxonomy of Moquiniastrum oligocephalum.
uses: Moquiniastrum oligocephalum, a plant native to certain regions of South America, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
